Dr.Rishi Verma

City Hospital

Neurosurgeon

A Neurosurgeon is a highly specialized medical doctor who diagnoses and performs surgical treatment of disorders affecting the brain, spinal cord, and peripheral nerves. This includes complex conditions such as brain tumors, spinal trauma, aneurysms, epilepsy, and congenital anomalies.

Our Services

Radiology & Imaging

Diagnostic imaging services such as X-ray, MRI, CT scan, ultrasound, and mammography.

Laboratory Services

Blood tests, biopsies, and other diagnostic tests for disease detection and monitoring.

Pharmacy Services

On-site pharmacy offering prescription medications and medical supplies.

ICU & Critical Care

Intensive monitoring and treatment for patients with life-threatening conditions or after major surgeries.

Surgical Services

General and specialized surgeries such as orthopedic, cardiac, neurological, and minimally invasive procedures.

Emergency Services (ER)

24/7 urgent care for trauma, heart attacks, strokes, and other critical conditions.

Testimonials

Priya Sharma

"The doctors were thorough, taking the time to explain every step of my treatment. I’m grateful for their dedication and would highly recommend this hospital to anyone seeking exceptional care."

Sandeep Mehta

"I came to City Hospital for a routine check-up and ended up receiving a diagnosis that saved my life. The medical team didn’t just treat me; they truly cared about my well-being."

Neha Singh

"Giving birth at City Hospital was an incredible experience. The maternity ward staff were supportive, kind, and professional. From my prenatal care to delivery, every step was handled with the utmost care."

Rajiv Kapoor
